fried_egg.name: Fried Egg
steps: Heat the pan and add oil.
Crack the egg in the pan.
Sprinkle salt and serve.

boiled_egg.name: Boiled Egg
steps: Boil water in a pot.
Add egg and wait 7 minutes.
Peel and enjoy.

adobong_manok.name: Chicken Adobo
steps: Marinate chicken in soy sauce and garlic for 30 mins.
Pan-fry the chicken until brown.
Add the marinade, vinegar, and bay leaves.
Simmer for 20-30 minutes until chicken is tender.

sinigang_na_baboy.name: Pork Sinigang
steps: Boil pork with onions and tomatoes until tender.
Add radish and simmer for 5 minutes.
Pour in the sinigang souring mix.
Add kangkong leaves, turn off heat, and cover for 2 minutes.

pancit_canton.name: Pancit Canton
steps: Sauté pork, shrimp, and vegetables.
Add soy sauce and a cup of water; bring to a boil.
Add noodles and stir until liquid is absorbed.
Serve with calamansi on the side.

tinolang_manok.name: Chicken Tinola
steps: Sauté ginger, garlic, and onion.
Add chicken and cook until slightly brown.
Pour in water and simmer until chicken is cooked.
Add sayote and malunggay leaves before serving.

beef_caldereta.name: Beef Caldereta
steps: Stew beef until very tender.
Add tomato sauce and liver spread.
Add potatoes and carrots; cook until soft.
Stir in cheese and bell peppers for a creamy finish.

tortang_talong.name: Tortang Talong
steps: Grill the eggplant until skin is charred.
Peel off the skin but keep the stem.
Flatten eggplant and dip in beaten eggs.
Pan-fry until golden brown.

lumpia_shanghai.name: Lumpiang Shanghai
steps: Mix pork, minced carrots, onions, and egg.
Wrap a small amount of mixture in wrappers.
Deep fry until golden brown and crispy.
Serve with sweet and sour sauce.

bicol_express.name: Bicol Express
steps: Sauté garlic, onion, and pork.
Add shrimp paste and chilies.
Pour in coconut milk.
Simmer until the sauce thickens and pork is tender.

ginataang_kalabasa.name: Ginataang Kalabasa
steps: Sauté ginger, garlic, and shrimp.
Add squash and coconut milk.
Simmer until squash is soft.
Add sitaw (string beans) and cook for 3 more minutes.

pork_menudo.name: Pork Menudo
steps: Sauté pork and liver.
Add tomato sauce and water; simmer until pork is soft.
Add diced potatoes, carrots, and hotdogs.
Stir in raisins and cook until sauce thickens.

nilagang_baka.name: Beef Nilaga
steps: Boil beef with onions and peppercorns until tender (approx 1-2 hours).
Add corn and potatoes.
Once potatoes are soft, add cabbage.
Season with fish sauce and serve hot.

chicken_afritada.name: Chicken Afritada
steps: Brown the chicken in a pan.
Add tomato sauce and water; simmer.
Add potatoes and carrots.
Add bell peppers and cook until sauce reduces.

bulalo.name: Beef Bulalo
steps: Boil beef bones for 3-4 hours until meat falls off the bone.
Remove scum from the surface regularly.
Add corn and simmer.
Add pechay leaves and serve immediately.

pork_sisig.name: Pork Sisig
steps: Boil and then grill pork until crispy.
Chop pork into very small pieces.
Sauté with onions and chilies.
Add mayonnaise and calamansi juice before serving on a sizzling plate.

lechon_paksiw.name: Lechon Paksiw
steps: Place lechon meat in a pot.
Add lechon sauce, vinegar, and water.
Add bay leaves and sugar.
Simmer until meat is tender and sauce thickens.

pork_adobo_sa_puti.name: Adobo sa Puti (White Adobo)
steps: Combine pork, vinegar, crushed garlic, salt, and peppercorns in a pot.
Simmer until the pork is tender and the liquid reduces.
Once dry, let the pork fry in its own fat until golden brown.
Add a little water to deglaze the pan and create a light sauce.

kare_kare.name: Kare-Kare
steps: Boil oxtail until very tender.
Soak annatto seeds in water to get the orange color; add the liquid to the pot.
Stir in peanut butter until the sauce thickens.
Add vegetables and cook until tender. Serve with bagoong on the side.

dinuguan.name: Dinuguan (Pork Blood Stew)
steps: Sauté garlic and onion, then add the pork until browned.
Pour in vinegar and simmer without stirring for 5 minutes.
Slowly pour in the pork blood while stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
Add chilies and simmer until the sauce thickens and turns dark.

laing.name: Laing (Taro Leaves in Coconut Milk)
steps: Sauté ginger, garlic, and pork in a pot.
Pour in coconut milk and shrimp paste; bring to a simmer.
Add the dried taro leaves but DO NOT stir until they are submerged and soft.
Add chilies and simmer until the coconut milk becomes oily.

pork_binagoongan.name: Pork Binagoongan
steps: Sauté garlic, onion, and tomatoes.
Add pork and cook until browned.
Stir in the shrimp paste and sugar; simmer until pork is tender.
Add fried eggplant slices before serving.

embutido.name: Embutido (Filipino Meatloaf)
steps: Mix ground pork, minced bell peppers, raisins, cheese, and 1 egg.
Spread the mixture on foil, place sausages and hard-boiled eggs in the center.
Roll the foil tightly and steam for 1 hour.
Chill, slice, and pan-fry before serving.

pinakbet.name: Pinakbet
steps: Sauté garlic, onion, and pork slices.
Add shrimp paste and cook for 2 minutes.
Add squash and bittermelon with a little water.
Add sitaw and okra; top with chicharon before serving.

chicken_pastel.name: Chicken Pastel
steps: Sauté chicken and chorizo.
Add potatoes and carrots; simmer in a bit of broth.
Pour in cream and mushrooms.
Transfer to a dish, cover with pastry crust (optional), and bake or serve as is.

crispy_pata.name: Crispy Pata
steps: Boil the pork leg with salt and spices until very tender (about 2 hours).
Drain and air-dry the leg completely (crucial for crispiness).
Deep fry in very hot oil until the skin is blistered and golden.
Serve with a soy-vinegar dipping sauce.

lechon_kawali.name: Lechon Kawali
steps: Boil pork belly with salt, pepper, and bay leaves until tender.
Dry the pork thoroughly and prick the skin with a fork.
Deep fry until the skin is crispy and meat is golden brown.
Chop into bite-sized pieces and serve with Mang Tomas sauce.

tokwa_t_baboy.name: Tokwa’t Baboy
steps: Boil the pork until tender, then slice into cubes.
Deep fry the tofu until crispy and cut into cubes.
Mix vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, and chopped onions in a bowl.
Combine pork and tofu, then pour the sauce over.

pork_steak.name: Pork Steak (Bistek Style)
steps: Marinate pork in soy sauce and calamansi for 30 minutes.
Pan-fry the pork chops until browned; set aside.
Sauté onion rings in the same pan.
Pour in the marinade, add sugar, simmer, and pour over the pork.

sopas.name: Creamy Chicken Sopas
steps: Sauté garlic, onion, and chicken; add water and boil.
Add macaroni and cook until al dente.
Add hotdogs, carrots, and cabbage.
Pour in evaporated milk and simmer for 2 minutes.

misua_with_patola.name: Misua with Patola
steps: Sauté garlic and onions, then add ground pork.
Add water and bring to a boil.
Add sliced patola (silk gourd) and cook for 3 minutes.
Add misua noodles, turn off heat after 1 minute, and serve.

bangus_sisig.name: Bangus Sisig
steps: Flake the fried bangus (milkfish) and remove all bones.
Sauté onions and chilies in a pan.
Add the fish flakes and toss until slightly crispy.
Mix in mayonnaise and soy sauce; serve on a hot plate.

turon.name: Turon (Banana Spring Rolls)
steps: Roll the banana in brown sugar.
Place on a wrapper with a slice of jackfruit and roll tightly.
Deep fry and sprinkle more sugar into the oil to glaze the wrapper.
Fry until the sugar has caramelized and turned golden brown.

banana_cue.name: Banana Cue
steps: Heat oil in a deep pan.
Add the bananas and fry for 2 minutes.
Sprinkle the brown sugar; let it melt and stick to the bananas.
Skewer the glazed bananas and serve.

maja_blanca.name: Maja Blanca
steps: Mix coconut milk, condensed milk, and corn kernels in a pot.
Dissolve cornstarch in a bit of milk and add to the pot.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thick.
Pour into a tray, cool, and top with latik (fried coconut curd).

kutsinta.name: Kutsinta
steps: Mix all dry ingredients in a bowl.
Add water, lye water, and annatto water; whisk until smooth.
Pour into greased molds and steam for 45 minutes.
Cool completely and serve with grated coconut.

leche_flan.name: Leche Flan
steps: Caramelize sugar in llaneras (molds).
Whisk egg yolks, condensed milk, evaporated milk, and vanilla gently.
Strain the mixture into the llaneras to ensure it's smooth.
Cover with foil and steam for 45 minutes; chill before serving.
